description: A simple, yet rock solid, functional language with an imperative bias, targeting UPLC

scripts.pub-pebble: cd packages/pebble && npm run ci && npm pub && cd ../..
scripts.pre-cli-commit: git add . && git commit -m "pre cli commit"
scripts.build-cli: npm run sync-pebble-version && npm run pre-cli-commit && npm run build-cli:no-commit
scripts.build-cli:no-commit: cd packages/pebble-cli && npm run build && cd ../..
scripts.pub: npm run pub-pebble && sleep 10 && npm run build-cli

author: Harmonic Labs
